presets.prompt: Short elegant reverse swell designed to pull naturally into the next section. Controlled bandwidth, soft tail and no cinematic exaggeration.
presets.exclude: huge riser, EDM sweep, trailer hit, noise blast, melody, long reverb

presets.prompt: Compact soft impact with a warm low body, restrained transient and short natural decay. Suitable for Arabic section changes without trailer-style weight.
presets.exclude: huge cinematic impact, taiko, EDM drop, sub explosion, long tail, metal hit

presets.prompt: Clean airy downlifter with smooth high-frequency descent and controlled duration. Minimal, elegant and free from EDM or trailer character.
presets.exclude: EDM sweep, white-noise blast, cinematic whoosh, melody, impact, long reverb

presets.prompt: Subtle analog tape and vinyl texture with low-level hiss, gentle instability and restrained saturation. Background depth only, with no rhythmic clicks.
presets.exclude: loud crackle, lo-fi beat, distortion, melody, percussion loop, heavy wow

presets.prompt: Subtle high-frequency air texture with restrained shimmer and slow movement. Adds depth without melody, rhythm or obvious riser shape.
presets.exclude: shimmer reverb wash, white-noise riser, cinematic FX, EDM sweep, percussion, melody

presets.prompt: Single mellow flugelhorn with soft attack, warm breath, restrained vibrato and concise lyrical phrases. Intimate and free of jazz-showcase phrasing.
presets.exclude: trumpet section, big band, brass stabs, jazz improvisation, reverb hall, epic brass

presets.prompt: Single muted trumpet playing short dry answers with soft attack, controlled pitch bends and immediate silence. No big-band brightness.
presets.exclude: trumpet section, big band, jazz solo, brass stabs, epic brass, reverb hall

presets.prompt: Small French-horn layer holding warm sustained support notes with slow movement and restrained dynamics. No heroic or cinematic phrasing.
presets.exclude: epic horn, trailer brass, marching brass, heroic theme, big swells, lead melody

presets.prompt: Single low trombone with warm rounded tone, sparse sustained support and short low-register answers. Controlled, dry and non-jazz.
presets.exclude: big band, brass section, jazz glissando, epic brass, marching tone, solo showcase

presets.prompt: Small 1970s-style brass section using short restrained unison figures and warm analog-era articulation. Compact transitions with no disco excess.
presets.exclude: big band, disco brass overload, epic brass, marching band, cinematic stabs, synthetic brass

presets.prompt: Single end-blown reed flute with dry breath attack, hollow air column, subtle pitch instability and restrained microtonal turns. Short phrases with clear silence.
presets.exclude: western flute, pan flute, recorder, clarinet, oboe, synthetic flute, woodwind ensemble

presets.prompt: Single low-pitched end-blown folk flute with earthy breath, rough natural edge and sparse descending phrases. One stable timbre only.
presets.exclude: western flute, ney ensemble, clarinet, synthetic wind, hybrid instrument, strings, reverb

presets.prompt: Single dark clarinet with woody low register, restrained bends and intimate lyrical phrasing. No orchestral doubling and no jazz-showcase runs.
presets.exclude: woodwind ensemble, jazz clarinet, bright classical tone, bass, chords, reverb hall

presets.prompt: Single bass flute using low breathy sustained tones, sparse movement and restrained air detail. Dark supportive color with no lead contour.
presets.exclude: western concert flute, flute ensemble, cinematic flute, melody, bright tone, large reverb

presets.prompt: Single acoustic double-reed folk wind with focused nasal tone, restrained ornaments and short purposeful Iraqi-Arabic phrases. Authentic but not wedding-style.
presets.exclude: wedding ensemble, festival mizmar, multiple reeds, brass, percussion loop, synthetic lead, reverb hall

presets.prompt: Single exposed Arabic tarab lead vocal with controlled ornaments, clear diction, wide dynamics and emotionally restrained phrasing. No backing vocals or choir.
presets.exclude: backing vocals, choir, humming, vocal doubles, heavy reverb, auto-tune effect

presets.prompt: Single intimate Arabic pop lead vocal with close delivery, soft consonants, controlled breath and modern restrained ornamentation. Clear and emotionally direct.
presets.exclude: choir, backing vocals, vocal doubles, belting, heavy tuning, large reverb

presets.prompt: Single exposed Iraqi-Arabic mawwal voice with free expressive timing, authentic maqam ornaments and controlled emotional rises. No instrumental accompaniment.
presets.exclude: choir, backing vocals, humming, pop beat, instruments, heavy reverb, vocal stack

presets.prompt: Single clean vocal guide with precise melody, stable timing, clear phrasing and minimal ornamentation. Designed as a temporary melody reference.
presets.exclude: backing vocals, choir, humming, vocal doubles, ad-libs, reverb, delay

presets.prompt: Single Arabic spoken-melodic vocal performance with intimate tone, measured pitch movement and clear rhythmic placement. No rap aggression and no choir.
presets.exclude: rap flow, choir, backing vocals, vocal doubles, shouting, heavy reverb, instruments

presets.prompt: Restrained backing-vocal unison entering only at selected phrase endings. Short, soft and clearly subordinate to the lead.
presets.exclude: choir pad, full harmony stack, humming, lead vocal, constant backing, large reverb

presets.prompt: Sparse octave backing double placed only on selected strong phrases. Tight timing, controlled tone and no continuous doubling.
presets.exclude: full harmony stack, choir, constant double, humming, lead vocal, heavy reverb

presets.prompt: Short female backing-vocal responses after selected lead phrases, with clear diction, concise melody and intentional silence before the next line.
presets.exclude: choir, humming, continuous backing, lead vocal, vocal pad, heavy reverb

presets.prompt: Compact male group response on selected phrase endings, warm unison tone and controlled energy. Traditional call-and-response without crowd noise.
presets.exclude: crowd chant, choir pad, humming, constant backing, lead vocal, stadium reverb

presets.prompt: Soft three-part backing harmony entering briefly at emotional peaks. Smooth blend, low level and clear separation from the lead vocal.
presets.exclude: large choir, gospel harmony, constant stack, humming pad, lead vocal, heavy reverb

presets.prompt: Complete Iraqi 1970s tarab song sketch with authentic maqam phrasing, restrained Wahda-style rhythm, warm live instrumentation and clear vocal space. Low-to-medium density.
presets.exclude: modern EDM, trap, commercial Arabic pop cliché, pseudo-oud, synthetic qanun, epic orchestra

presets.prompt: Complete modern Iraqi pop song sketch with refined maqam phrasing, clean contemporary rhythm, controlled strings and strong vocal focus. No stock oriental presets.
presets.exclude: wedding arrangement, festival beat, stock Arabic lead, pseudo-oud, dense layers, EDM

presets.prompt: Complete modern Khaleeji ballad with restrained percussion, warm harmony, elegant strings and spacious vocal-first production. Emotional but not commercial cliché.
presets.exclude: wedding groove, fast khaleeji folk, brass section, EDM, dense percussion, stock oriental lead

presets.prompt: Complete Arabic orchestral ballad with small live strings, piano, restrained percussion and gradual emotional growth. Clear song form and no trailer-style orchestration.
presets.exclude: epic orchestra, trailer strings, huge impacts, commercial cliché, dense brass, EDM

presets.prompt: Complete Iraqi neo-pop sketch combining authentic melodic phrasing with premium hybrid sound design, low-density rhythm and modern vocal space.
presets.exclude: stock Arabic lead, oriental preset, trap, EDM, pseudo-oud, generic hybrid intro

presets.prompt: Single trapezoidal plucked zither with grouped triple strings, dry woody transient, short decay and sparse finger-plectrum articulation. No sweeping glissando.
presets.exclude: synthetic qanun, harp, santur, hammered dulcimer, stock oriental pluck, arpeggio loop

presets.prompt: Single acoustic hammered zither with warm wooden body, controlled mallet attack, short natural decay and sparse Iraqi melodic figures. No bright cinematic shimmer.
presets.exclude: synthetic santur, qanun, harp, cimbalom orchestra, bright bell preset, arpeggio loop

presets.prompt: Single designed hybrid solo voice combining a muted pluck transient, warm analog core and breath-textured upper layer. Expressive monophonic taqsim with controlled portamento and original timbre.
presets.exclude: stock Arabic lead, oud imitation, qanun imitation, ney imitation, EDM lead, chords, bass, percussion

presets.prompt: Two-part call and response: one short Joza phrase followed by one short Ney answer. Never overlap; preserve clear silence between them.
presets.exclude: ensemble, bass, chords, percussion, simultaneous playing, reverb wash, extra instruments

presets.prompt: Original bowed-string rhythmic texture made from short dry strokes, muted resonance and subtle human pulse. No identifiable stock instrument and no lead melody.
presets.exclude: string orchestra, cinematic ostinato, MIDI strings, lead violin, epic swell, reverb wash
